description: CompositionBlue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm ironIf shopping is what defines you best, then there's no better way to flaunt your happy quotient than with this tantra t-shirt. The short sleeves and wide round neck add oodles of attitude, while the graphic print and blue colour give it a happy vibe. Team this t-shirt with jeans and flip flops, don a tote and jet start your shopping spree.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
